properties.name: Port de Djibouti (dual-use)
properties.description: Port commercial abritant FFDj (FR), Camp Lemonnier (US), SLOC japonaise, UNITAF. Carrefour mondial.

properties.name: Simon's Town
properties.description: Base principale SA Navy. Cap de Bonne-Esperance, point de controle strategique.

properties.name: Dakar (base navale)
properties.description: Base Marine senegalaise + escale Atlantique sud pour Marines alliees (FR/US).

properties.name: Diego Garcia
properties.description: Base navale et aerienne strategique US/UK. Territoire britannique ocean Indien (BIOT).

properties.name: Luanda (Marine angolaise)
properties.description: Base marine angolaise. Patrouilles anti-piraterie Golfe de Guinee.

properties.name: Mombasa (Kenya Navy)
properties.description: Base navale kenyane. Operations anti-Shabaab + anti-piraterie ocean Indien.

properties.name: Lagos (Nigerian Navy)
properties.description: QG Marine nigeriane. Ops Deep Blue Golfe de Guinee anti-piraterie. Patrouilleurs chinois HQ-17.

properties.name: Beira (Moz Navy)
properties.description: Base navale mozambicaine. Ops anti-ISIS-Moz Cabo Delgado + canal Mozambique.

properties.name: Massawa (Eritrean Navy)
properties.description: Base navale erythreenne + support EAU historique. Mer Rouge cle strategique.
